title: Trimming Shop Miniature Christmas Trees – 4pc Set of Frosted Plastic Bottle Brush Trees, Small Artificial Mini Pine Trees with Wooden Base for Xmas Village, Tabletop Winter Décor & Displays
features: 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐌𝐢𝐧𝐢𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐂𝐡𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐦𝐚𝐬 𝐓𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐬 𝐛𝐲 𝐓𝐫𝐢𝐦𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐒𝐡𝐨𝐩: Bring a touch of winter magic to your home with this exquisite set of miniature Christmas trees. Designed to capture the beauty of a snow-dusted forest, these small artificial miniatures plastic snow frost trees add elegance and warmth to any festive display — from Christmas tabletops to winter village dioramas and fairy garden scenes.

𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐮𝐦 𝐏𝐥𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐜 & 𝐖𝐨𝐨𝐝𝐞𝐧 𝐁𝐚𝐬𝐞 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧: Each tree is beautifully handcrafted from durable plastic fibre, shaped to resemble a natural pine tree with a delicate frosted finish. The Mini Pine Trees with Wooden Base ensure stability and style, making them both decorative and practical for repeated seasonal use.

𝐅𝐫𝐨𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐃𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 & 𝐑𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐜 𝐅𝐢𝐧𝐢𝐬𝐡: These Frosted Bottle Brush Trees feature a fine white flocking that mimics freshly fallen snow. The texture, colour, and detail create a lifelike winter effect, perfect for complementing rustic table décor, festive centrepieces, or charming miniature Christmas villages.

𝐏𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐞𝐜𝐭 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐀𝐥𝐥 𝐅𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐒𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐬: Ideal for Christmas home displays, event styling, DIY crafts, or creative tabletop winter décor, these Artificial Mini Christmas Trees bring festive cheer to homes, offices, cafes, and classrooms. They also make lovely gifts for craft lovers and collectors.

𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐞𝐭𝐞 𝟒-𝐏𝐢𝐞𝐜𝐞 𝐌𝐢𝐧𝐢 𝐓𝐫𝐞𝐞 𝐒𝐞𝐭: This pack includes a set of 4 miniature plastic frosted Christmas trees in assorted sizes (10cm, 15cm, 20cm, 25cm). Each tree features a sturdy wooden base, allowing easy placement for Christmas village trees, fairy gardens, or seasonal display scenes.
description: Product Description What materials are the enchanted mini winter woods trees made from? These miniature Christmas trees feature premium plastic fibre branches and sturdy wooden bases for authentic texture and stable displays. How realistic is the snow-frosted effect? Each frosted bottle brush tree is lightly flocked with white powder to mimic freshly fallen snow, offering a lifelike winter woodland finish. Can I use these mini pine trees beyond Christmas? Absolutely. These artificial mini-Christmas trees work brilliantly for birthday centrepieces, wedding décor, café displays, and seasonal events. Do the decorative trees fit small spaces? Yes, their compact 10cm–25cm heights and slender fibre branches make them ideal for mantels, tabletops, fairy gardens, and window sills. What’s included in the enchanted mini winter woods set? A premium 4-piece collection of plastic snow frost trees in assorted heights—10cm, 15cm, 20cm, 25cm—all complete with solid wooden bases.
